fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 68 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), which incorrectly treats an entry as valid when the current time is exactly equal to the expiry time. It should use a greater-than-or-equal-to comparison (`>=`) to correctly invalidate entries at the exact moment of expiry.

constraints.intent: The condition to bypass the expiry check requires the current time to be strictly less than the effective expiry.
A non-None value should only be returned if the entry has not expired (i.e., current time is strictly less than expiry).
The program branch that returns a cached value should only be executed if the entry is still valid.
